arts.ttl: Battling for nine year olds and 'revenge' transfers - Man United vs Man City rivalry is truly alive
arts.sum: As Manchester United and Manchester City under perform in the Premier League, the rivalry is alive and kicking below the surface - both in the boardroom and on the training pitches.

arts.ttl: 'No regrets' - one-time Manchester United protege loved by Jose Mourinho now targeting Wembley
arts.sum: Aidan Barlow is playing a leading role for Rochdale this season as the club look to secure a double

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne made me doubt my own eyes - Man City are losing a legend
arts.sum: Manchester City star Kevin De Bruyne will say goodbye to the club after a phenomenal 10 years at the Etihad

arts.ttl: I celebrated 'like a lunatic' after Manchester United winner vs Man City - Mark Hughes was raging
arts.sum: Manchester United's famous 4-3 win over Man City at Old Trafford in September 2009 will always be remembered for Michael Owen's last-gasp winner - but it was Gary Neville who Mark Hughes took exception to.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Fresh injury problem emerges as Ruben Amorim offers sobering reality check
arts.sum: Manchester United have been hampered by injuries all season and are likely to be without a key defender for Sunday's derby against Manchester City in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Wolves 'explore' shock move for Man United outcast as Serie A star monitored
arts.sum: Latest Manchester United news and rumours including updates on Jadon Sancho's future at the club and interest in Serie A star Lorenzo Lucca

arts.ttl: The secrets behind Anthony Elanga's transformation into Nottingham Forest's flying machine and the Man United stars who inspired him to become a leading voice in Nuno Espirito Santo's dressing room
arts.sum: TOM COLLOMOSSE: Even though he is only 22, Elanga is one of Forest's band leaders, along with Gibbs-White, Aina and Hudson-Odoi, and is central to the dynamic Nuno has created.

arts.ttl: GRAEME SOUNESS: 'Unstoppable' Kevin De Bruyne has left his mark on the English game... and the one boss who should beat fabulous Nuno Espirito Santo to Manager of the Season prize
arts.sum: GRAEME SOUNESS: I believe he was the best midfield player in the Premier League for a good five years. In time, supporters will reflect on him saying: 'You should have seen him play'.

arts.ttl: Phil Foden told how to become England favourite again as Thomas Tuchel handed warning
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Manchester City's attacking midfielder Phil Foden has had a tough season and was in the spotlight again recently after failing to sparkle for England in Thomas Tuchel’s opening match

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Man United 'dealt Viktor Gyokeres transfer blow' as new club joins race for Sporting star
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United reportedly suffer a blow in their respective pursuits of Sporting Lisbon star Viktor Gyokeres.
